The '''''Jaamn''''' was a [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]] that was apparently captured by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] at some point. The ship was sent to repair the [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] ''[[Op Mus]]'' which had been stranded in space after an equipment malfunction. [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], while flying his [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]], watched over the repairs in case [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces attempted to take either ship.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''

*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
